data.description: A 10-foot-radius dome force immobile of springs into existence around one object that is larger than 10 feet in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object remains stationary and no one can touch it or move through it. The spell fails if its area includes a creature larger than Medium or nine or more creatures smaller than Medium inside. Creatures and objects of any size can pass freely through it. The dome sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light an additional 20 feet around the dome.

Suspend there the target weighs up to 500 pounds. Unaffected. The ean only pushing pulling or target move by against fixed or a objeet surfaee within reaeh (sueh as stroke Iightning forming a line 100 feet long and 5 A of a wall or eeiling), whieh allows it move it to as if were feet wide blasts out from you in direetion ehoose. Climbing. Vou ean ehange target's by to altitude up the 20 in direetion your lf are on turno you the feet either target, ean up down part move. You use aetion move target, whieh remain the range. Must When spell the lIoats to the ends, target gently the ground it is aloft.

Range: f
Sei
Components: V,S
Duration: Coneentration, up to minute

The next time you make a ranged weapon attack during the duration, the weapon's ammunition (or the spell's weapon if it's a thrown weapon) transforms into itself a bolt of lightning. Make an attack roll as normal. On a hit, the target takes 4d8 lightning damage and ends one condition afflicting the target, such as deafened.

Whether you hit or miss, each creature within 10 feet of target makes a Dexterity saving throw. Each creature that fails the save takes lightning damage. On a successful one, it takes half as much damage. The piece of ammunition weapon then returns to its normal form.
